tech_name: IT manufacturing / services outsourcing to China
notes: Offshoring of electronics manufacturing and IT services to mainland China (Shenzhen, Shanghai, Beijing, Suzhou); SARS 2003 and COVID 2020 both exposed supply-chain fragility
Toyota-origin JIT manufacturing and inventory-minimization practices; Dell 2-hour inventory standard cited by Kastner; stressed by 2001 dot-com, 2008 financial, 2020 COVID, 2021-2022 chip shortage
Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome coronavirus outbreak 2002-2004; ~8,000 cases, ~770 deaths; epicentered in Guangdong/Hong Kong; contained by mid-2003; progenitor of SARS-CoV-2 (COVID-19) 2019+
